prompt:
Game: Light Warrior.
Asset ID: environment.arena.
Modular sacred arena kit reference for a UE5 third-person combat game. Pale stone floor tiles, circular sanctuary center, gold restored seams, dawn-blue navigation lanes, violet corruption chunks outside safe territory, light well pedestal, huge flat-world horizon, distant sacred technology towers, clean combat lanes, one gameplay mockup panel.
Global style rules: No text, logo, watermark, UI labels, or decorative frame inside generated images. Prioritize UE5 third-person gameplay readability over decorative micro-detail. Use the game world's reality: luminous guardian power, living darkness, sacred technology, resonance, etheric force, Tartaria-inspired restored architecture, and flat huge-world horizon logic. Hero reads as white-gold and dawn-blue. Enemies read as violet-black with red-violet danger tells. Restoration reads as warm gold and dawn-blue. Every output is a candidate until proven in a UE5 gameplay capture.
Avoid: text, letters, logo, watermark, random clutter, dense props blocking movement, muddy brown palette, dark unreadable floor, marketing poster composition.
review_gate: Combat lanes, safe center, corruption pressure, and restored seams must remain readable.
